title: Chill vibes, politics rants, movie talk
description: Two strangers bond over Wicked, US politics stress, and surprisingly wholesome Canadian-American banter before things get flirty.

messages.Stranger: hey
m
age?
from?
canada
Toronto
it's like a smaller New York
yes, I love a big city
you more of a small town girl?
haha
oh ok
for sure
but not too busy?
cool
you in college there?
I work
no, not at all
my job and my life is pretty chill
your president is the only thing stressing even us chill people out
where do you even start?
hard to tell whether he's more evil or more corrupt
and he surrounds himself with people who are just as bad
if it get to bad I'll meet you at the canadian border and sneak you in dressed as a moose or something, haha
I'm Canadian, it's the law that we have to be nice and helpful, haha
so what brings you here tonight?
what do you usually do for fun?
do you have any favourite movies?
what's the best one you've seen recently?
I saw The Bride! today
that was a trip
still not sure how much I liked it
it will have to sit with me for a while
maybe a couple of more viewings
that was a lot to take it
my fave movie of the last couple of years is Wicked
just blew me away
Wicked For Good wasn't as good but I liked it well enough
yes, it came out last November
it's the conclusion of the first film
they filmed them both at the same time
it's darker than the first one and the songs aren't quite as good
but still lots to like about it
you should
I liked it more on the second watch because I was already prepared for the parts I didn't like that much
I avoided the trailers so I wouldn't spoil anything
had to go for a whole year without reading anything about it or the play so I wouldn't spoil it, haha
I take my movie going seriously! lol
I heard that they're doing a "sing-a-long" screening of both movies later this month in my city
for sure going to that!
I think I'm just a 14 year old girl trapped in the body of a 22 year old man, haha!
then we'd make a cute lesbian couple, haha
do you have a sexual preference?
ya, I fell that same about girls
feel
I can appreciate a good looking guy
but from the waist down that don't do much for me, lol
although I did have a gf who for girls after we broke up...I think I told her one too many times how amazing eating pussy was, haha
I over sold it
I wasn't lying though
what's your body count?
sorry, didn't mean to offend
